Top-Rated, Health-Safe Restaurants in Merritt Island

These 13 Merritt Island restaurants pass Florida health inspections with an A grade and earn strong diner ratings — a clean kitchen and a meal people love. Sorted by rating.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • A 100 K
    KOLACHE BAR Other ★ 5 (1213) Merritt Island · Brevard County Inspected Jun 2026
  • A 96 C
    CARRABBA'S ITALIAN GRILL Italian ★ 4.6 (2798) Merritt Island · Brevard County VegGF +3 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 98 P
    PACIFIC RIM Sushi ★ 4.6 (1968) Merritt Island · Brevard County VegGF +5 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 100 C
    CHICK FIL A STORE 04038 Other ★ 4.5 (2614) Merritt Island · Brevard County Healthy Inspected Apr 2026
  • A 100 C
    CAUSEWAY DINER American ★ 4.5 (1226) Merritt Island · Brevard County Healthy Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 100 W
    WABI SABI Japanese ★ 4.5 (1180) Merritt Island · Brevard County VeganVeg +4 more Inspected Jun 2026
  • A 91 O
    OUTBACK STEAKHOUSE American ★ 4.4 (2897) Merritt Island · Brevard County GFDF +5 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 100 I
    ISLAND WATERFRONT BAR AND GRILL Other ★ 4.3 (2240) Merritt Island · Brevard County VeganVeg +2 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 100 C
    CHECKERS #3144 American ★ 3.8 (1502) Merritt Island · Brevard County Inspected Apr 2026
  • A 96 S
    SONIC DRIVE-IN #6587 American ★ 3.8 (1146) Merritt Island · Brevard County Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 93 T

  • A 98 M

  • A 96 W
